features.description: Bedrock credentials from awsCredentialExport are now cached until their Expiration instead of a fixed 1 hour.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved Bedrock credential caching: credentials from `awsCredentialExport` are now cached until their `Expiration` instead of a fixed 1 hour

features.description: availableModels allowlist now blocks ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL env redirects and refuses /fast switches outside the allo
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `availableModels` enforcement: alias model picks can no longer be redirected to a blocked model via `ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL` environment variables, and `/fast` now refuses to toggle when it would switch to a model outside the allowlist

features.description: Hook `if` conditions now correctly match documented tool path patterns like Edit(src/**), Read(~/.ssh/**), Read(.env).
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed hook `if` conditions for Read/Edit/Write tool paths: documented patterns like `Edit(src/**)`, `Read(~/.ssh/**)`, and `Read(.env)` now match correctly

features.description: Remote Control connections from web/mobile no longer silently switch the session's active model.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Remote Control connecting from web/mobile silently switching the session's model

features.description: Remote Control sessions now disconnect when you sign in to a different account.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Remote Control sessions not disconnecting when you sign in to a different account

features.description: Session titles generated in conversation language; new `language` setting pins a specific language.
features.reference_changelog_line: Session titles are now generated in the language of your conversation (set the `language` setting to pin a specific language)

features.description: Added `footerLinksRegexes` setting for regex-matched link badges in the footer row, set via user or managed settings.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `footerLinksRegexes` setting for regex-matched link badges in the footer row, configurable via user or managed settings
